hibernate-mapping.sql-query:
--Check for the unbillable set @delivery_amount = (select COALESCE(SUM(ShippingCharge),0.0) from ROI_RequestCoreChargesShipping where ROI_RequestCoreCharges_seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreCharges_seq from ROI_RequestCoreCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId)) + (select COALESCE(SUM(amount),0.0) from ROI_RequestCoreChargesDocument where ROI_RequestCoreCharges_seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreCharges_seq from ROI_RequestCoreCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId)) + (select COALESCE(SUM(amount),0.0) from ROI_RequestCoreChargesFee where ROI_RequestCoreCharges_seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreCharges_seq from ROI_RequestCoreCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId)) set @delivery_charge_amount = (select COALESCE(SUM(ShippingCharge),0.0) from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId)) + (select COALESCE(SUM(amount),0.0) from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId)) + (select COALESCE(SUM(amount),0.0) from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId)) --set @unbillable_amount = (select COALESCE(SUM(amount),0.0) from @tmpRequestCoreDeliveryChargeAmount)
-- Billable Request IF(@delivery_amount > 0 OR @delivery_charge_amount > 0) BEGIN UPDATE ROI_RequestCore set Unbillable = 0 where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId UPDATE ROI_RequestCoreCharges set Unbillable = 0 where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId UPDATE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges set Unbillable = 0 where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId
-- Add Jorunal Entry for Send Invoice set @requestDeliveryCharges_id = (select top 1 ROI_requestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId order by ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) while @requestDeliveryCharges_id is not null BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalEntry] ([ROI_Requestor_Seq], [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq]) values (@requestor_seq, -1) select @journalentry_id = SCOPE_IDENTITY(); -- Add Journal Detail
select @Date=Created_Dt from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id select @Amount=rcdcd.Amount from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc join ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument rcdcd on rcdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq=rcdcd.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq where rcdc.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id IF( @Amount is not null) BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalDetail] ([ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq],[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq],[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq],[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq],[CreditDebitSideFlag],[DecreaseIncreaseFlag],[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq],[Amount],[TxnOccurenceTimestamp],[ROI_JournalEntry_Seq]) SELECT [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq] ,[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] ,[CreditDebitSideFlag] ,[DecreaseIncreaseFlag] ,@requestDeliveryCharges_id ,@Amount ,@Date ,@journalentry_id FROM [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate] where [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] = -1 and [ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_seq] = -1 END select @Amount=rcdcf.Amount from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc join ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee rcdcf on rcdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq=rcdcf.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq where rcdc.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id and rcdcf.IsCustomFee=0 IF( @Amount is not null) BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalDetail] ([ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq],[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq],[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq],[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq],[CreditDebitSideFlag],[DecreaseIncreaseFlag],[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq],[Amount],[TxnOccurenceTimestamp],[ROI_JournalEntry_Seq]) SELECT [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq] ,[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] ,[CreditDebitSideFlag] ,[DecreaseIncreaseFlag] ,@requestDeliveryCharges_id ,@Amount ,@Date ,@journalentry_id FROM [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate] where [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] = -1 and [ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_seq] = -2 END select @Amount=rcdcf.Amount from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc join ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee rcdcf on rcdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq=rcdcf.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq where rcdc.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id and rcdcf.IsCustomFee=1 IF( @Amount is not null) BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalDetail] ([ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq],[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq],[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq],[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq],[CreditDebitSideFlag],[DecreaseIncreaseFlag],[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq],[Amount],[TxnOccurenceTimestamp],[ROI_JournalEntry_Seq]) SELECT [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq] ,[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] ,[CreditDebitSideFlag] ,[DecreaseIncreaseFlag] ,@requestDeliveryCharges_id ,@Amount ,@Date ,@journalentry_id FROM [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate] where [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] = -1 and [ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_seq] = -3 END select @Amount=rcdcs.ShippingCharge from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc join ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping rcdcs on rcdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq=rcdcs.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq where rcdc.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id IF( @Amount is not null) BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalDetail] ([ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq],[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq],[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq],[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq],[CreditDebitSideFlag],[DecreaseIncreaseFlag],[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq],[Amount],[TxnOccurenceTimestamp],[ROI_JournalEntry_Seq]) SELECT [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq] ,[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] ,[CreditDebitSideFlag] ,[DecreaseIncreaseFlag] ,@requestDeliveryCharges_id ,@Amount ,@Date ,@journalentry_id FROM [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate] where [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] = -1 and [ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_seq] = -4 END select @Amount=rcdcd.Salestax_Amount from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc join ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument rcdcd on rcdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq=rcdcd.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq where rcdc.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id IF( @Amount is not null) BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalDetail] ([ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq],[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq],[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq],[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq],[CreditDebitSideFlag],[DecreaseIncreaseFlag],[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq],[Amount],[TxnOccurenceTimestamp],[ROI_JournalEntry_Seq]) SELECT [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq] ,[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] ,[CreditDebitSideFlag] ,[DecreaseIncreaseFlag] ,@requestDeliveryCharges_id ,@Amount ,@Date ,@journalentry_id FROM [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate] where [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] = -1 and [ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_seq] = -5 END select @Amount=rcdcf.Salestax_Amount from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc join ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee rcdcf on rcdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq=rcdcf.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq where rcdc.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id and rcdcf.IsCustomFee=0 IF( @Amount is not null) BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalDetail] ([ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq],[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq],[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq],[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq],[CreditDebitSideFlag],[DecreaseIncreaseFlag],[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq],[Amount],[TxnOccurenceTimestamp],[ROI_JournalEntry_Seq]) SELECT [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq] ,[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] ,[CreditDebitSideFlag] ,[DecreaseIncreaseFlag] ,@requestDeliveryCharges_id ,@Amount ,@Date ,@journalentry_id FROM [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate] where [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] = -1 and [ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_seq] = -6 END select @Amount=rcdcf.Salestax_Amount from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc join ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee rcdcf on rcdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq=rcdcf.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq where rcdc.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id and rcdcf.IsCustomFee=1 IF( @Amount is not null) BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalDetail] ([ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq],[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq],[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq],[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq],[CreditDebitSideFlag],[DecreaseIncreaseFlag],[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq],[Amount],[TxnOccurenceTimestamp],[ROI_JournalEntry_Seq]) SELECT [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq] ,[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] ,[CreditDebitSideFlag] ,[DecreaseIncreaseFlag] ,@requestDeliveryCharges_id ,@Amount ,@Date ,@journalentry_id FROM [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate] where [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] = -1 and [ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_seq] = -7 END set @requestDeliveryCharges_id = (select top 1 ROI_requestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId and ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq >@requestDeliveryCharges_id order by ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) END END ELSE BEGIN -- update unbillable flag if exists(select 1 from ROI_RequestCoreCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) begin UPDATE ROI_RequestCore set Unbillable = 1 where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId UPDATE ROI_RequestCoreCharges set Unbillable = 1 where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId UPDATE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges set Unbillable = 1 where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId end -- Add journal entries for unbillable request set @requestDeliveryCharges_id = (select top 1 ROI_requestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from @ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_IDX order by ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) while @requestDeliveryCharges_id is not null BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalEntry] ([ROI_Requestor_Seq], [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq]) values (@requestor_seq, -1) select @journalentry_id = SCOPE_IDENTITY(); -- Add Journal Detail
select @Date=Created_Dt from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id select @Amount=rcdcd.Amount from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc join ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument rcdcd on rcdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq=rcdcd.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq where rcdc.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id IF( @Amount is not null) BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalDetail] ([ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq],[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq],[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq],[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq],[CreditDebitSideFlag],[DecreaseIncreaseFlag],[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq],[Amount],[TxnOccurenceTimestamp],[ROI_JournalEntry_Seq]) SELECT [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq] ,[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] ,[CreditDebitSideFlag] ,[DecreaseIncreaseFlag] ,@requestDeliveryCharges_id ,@Amount ,@Date ,@journalentry_id FROM [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate] where [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] = -1 and [ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_seq] = -8 END select @Amount=rcdcf.Amount from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc join ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee rcdcf on rcdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq=rcdcf.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq where rcdc.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id and rcdcf.IsCustomFee=0 IF( @Amount is not null) BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalDetail] ([ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq],[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq],[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq],[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq],[CreditDebitSideFlag],[DecreaseIncreaseFlag],[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq],[Amount],[TxnOccurenceTimestamp],[ROI_JournalEntry_Seq]) SELECT [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq] ,[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] ,[CreditDebitSideFlag] ,[DecreaseIncreaseFlag] ,@requestDeliveryCharges_id ,@Amount ,@Date ,@journalentry_id FROM [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate] where [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] = -1 and [ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_seq] = -9 END select @Amount=rcdcf.Amount from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc join ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee rcdcf on rcdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq=rcdcf.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq where rcdc.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id and rcdcf.IsCustomFee=1 IF( @Amount is not null) BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalDetail] ([ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq],[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq],[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq],[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq],[CreditDebitSideFlag],[DecreaseIncreaseFlag],[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq],[Amount],[TxnOccurenceTimestamp],[ROI_JournalEntry_Seq]) SELECT [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq] ,[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] ,[CreditDebitSideFlag] ,[DecreaseIncreaseFlag] ,@requestDeliveryCharges_id ,@Amount ,@Date ,@journalentry_id FROM [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate] where [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] = -1 and [ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_seq] = -10 END select @Amount=rcdcs.ShippingCharge from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc join ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping rcdcs on rcdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq=rcdcs.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq where rcdc.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id IF( @Amount is not null) BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalDetail] ([ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq],[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq],[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq],[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq],[CreditDebitSideFlag],[DecreaseIncreaseFlag],[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq],[Amount],[TxnOccurenceTimestamp],[ROI_JournalEntry_Seq]) SELECT [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq] ,[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] ,[CreditDebitSideFlag] ,[DecreaseIncreaseFlag] ,@requestDeliveryCharges_id ,@Amount ,@Date ,@journalentry_id FROM [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate] where [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] = -1 and [ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_seq] = -11 END select @Amount=rcdcd.Salestax_Amount from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc join ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument rcdcd on rcdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq=rcdcd.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq where rcdc.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id IF( @Amount is not null) BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalDetail] ([ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq],[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq],[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq],[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq],[CreditDebitSideFlag],[DecreaseIncreaseFlag],[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq],[Amount],[TxnOccurenceTimestamp],[ROI_JournalEntry_Seq]) SELECT [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq] ,[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] ,[CreditDebitSideFlag] ,[DecreaseIncreaseFlag] ,@requestDeliveryCharges_id ,@Amount ,@Date ,@journalentry_id FROM [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate] where [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] = -1 and [ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_seq] = -12 END select @Amount=rcdcf.Salestax_Amount from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc join ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee rcdcf on rcdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq=rcdcf.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq where rcdc.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id and rcdcf.IsCustomFee=0 IF( @Amount is not null) BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalDetail] ([ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq],[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq],[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq],[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq],[CreditDebitSideFlag],[DecreaseIncreaseFlag],[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq],[Amount],[TxnOccurenceTimestamp],[ROI_JournalEntry_Seq]) SELECT [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq] ,[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] ,[CreditDebitSideFlag] ,[DecreaseIncreaseFlag] ,@requestDeliveryCharges_id ,@Amount ,@Date ,@journalentry_id FROM [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate] where [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] = -1 and [ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_seq] = -13 END select @Amount=rcdcf.Salestax_Amount from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc join ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee rcdcf on rcdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq=rcdcf.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq where rcdc.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = @requestDeliveryCharges_id and rcdcf.IsCustomFee=1 IF( @Amount is not null) BEGIN insert into [ROI_JournalDetail] ([ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq],[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq],[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq],[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq],[CreditDebitSideFlag],[DecreaseIncreaseFlag],[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq],[Amount],[TxnOccurenceTimestamp],[ROI_JournalEntry_Seq]) SELECT [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] ,[ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq] ,[ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] ,[CreditDebitSideFlag] ,[DecreaseIncreaseFlag] ,@requestDeliveryCharges_id ,@Amount ,@Date ,@journalentry_id FROM [ROI_JournalDetailTemplate] where [ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq] = -1 and [ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_seq] = -14 END set @requestDeliveryCharges_id = (select top 1 ROI_requestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from @ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_IDX where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq >@requestDeliveryCharges_id order by ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) END
END
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_Conversion_RequestMain]') AND type in (N'P', N'PC')) DROP PROCEDURE [dbo].[ROI_Conversion_RequestMain]

IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_Conversion_Delete_RequestCore]') AND type in (N'P', N'PC')) DROP PROCEDURE [dbo].[ROI_Conversion_Delete_RequestCore]

CREATE procedure [dbo].[ROI_Conversion_Delete_RequestCore] @requestId bigint as BEGIN BEGIN TRY SET NOCOUNT ON Delete from ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_Pages where ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDelivery where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_Pages] where ROI_Versions_Seq in (Select ROI_Versions_Seq from [ROI_Versions] where ROI_Documents_Seq in (select ROI_Documents_Seq from [ROI_Documents] where ROI_Patients_Seq in (Select ROI_Patients_Seq from [ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId))) Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_Versions] where ROI_Documents_Seq in (select ROI_Documents_Seq from [ROI_Documents] where ROI_Patients_Seq in (Select ROI_Patients_Seq from [ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId)) Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_Documents] where ROI_Patients_Seq in (Select ROI_Patients_Seq from [ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_ENCOUNTERS] where ROI_Patients_Seq in (Select ROI_Patients_Seq from [ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore where ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDelivery where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore] where ROI_Patients_Seq in (Select ROI_Patients_Seq from [ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore where ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDelivery where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore] where ROI_Patients_Seq in (Select ROI_Patients_Seq from [ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_ConversionMapping_SupplementarityDocuments] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_ConversionMapping_SupplementarityAttachments] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId Delete from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) DECLARE @ROI_PATIENTS_IDX table ( ROI_Patients_Seq bigint ); Insert into @ROI_PATIENTS_IDX select ROI_Patients_Seq from [ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId
Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_PATIENTS] where ROI_Patients_Seq in ( select ROI_Patients_Seq from @ROI_PATIENTS_IDX) Delete from ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_Pages where ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDelivery where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore where ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDelivery where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore where ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDelivery where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore] where ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq in (select ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq from [ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore] where ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq in (select ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq from [ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_ConversionMapping_SupplementalDocuments] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_ConversionMapping_SupplementalAttachments] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_ConversionMapping_SupplementalPatient] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId DECLARE @ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_IDX table ( ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq bigint ); Insert into @ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_IDX select ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq from [ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId
Delete from ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore] where ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq in (select ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq from @ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_IDX) Delete from [cabinet].[dbo].[ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId Delete from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesMigrated where ROI_RequestCore_Seq=@requestId
-- delete JorunalEntry and JournalDetail table declare @tmp table (seq int); insert into @tmp select ROI_JournalEntry_Seq from ROI_JournalDetail where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in ( select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq=@requestId) delete from ROI_JournalEntry where ROI_JournalEntry_Seq in (select seq from @tmp) delete from ROI_JournalDetail where ROI_JournalEntry_Seq in (select seq from @tmp)
delete from @tmp; insert into @tmp select ROI_JournalEntry_Seq from ROI_JournalDetail where ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq in ( select ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq from dbo.ROI_ConversionMapping_RequestorPayment where ROI_RequestCore_Seq=@requestId) delete from ROI_JournalEntry where ROI_JournalEntry_Seq in (select seq from @tmp) delete from ROI_JournalDetail where ROI_JournalEntry_Seq in (select seq from @tmp)
delete from @tmp; insert into @tmp select ROI_JournalEntry_Seq from ROI_JournalDetail where ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq in ( select ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq from dbo.ROI_ConversionMapping_RequestorAdjustment where ROI_RequestCore_Seq=@requestId) delete from ROI_JournalEntry where ROI_JournalEntry_Seq in (select seq from @tmp) delete from ROI_JournalDetail where ROI_JournalEntry_Seq in (select seq from @tmp)
delete from @tmp; insert into @tmp select ROI_JournalEntry_Seq from ROI_JournalDetail where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment_seq in ( select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment_seq from dbo.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq=@requestId)) delete from ROI_JournalEntry where ROI_JournalEntry_Seq in (select seq from @tmp) delete from ROI_JournalDetail where ROI_JournalEntry_Seq in (select seq from @tmp)
delete from @tmp; insert into @tmp select ROI_JournalEntry_Seq from ROI_JournalDetail where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq in ( select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq from dbo.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq=@requestId)) delete from ROI_JournalEntry where ROI_JournalEntry_Seq in (select seq from @tmp) delete from ROI_JournalDetail where ROI_JournalEntry_Seq in (select seq from @tmp)
delete from @tmp; insert into @tmp select ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq from cabinet.dbo.ROI_ConversionMapping_RequestorPayment where ROI_RequestCore_Seq=@requestId; delete from cabinet.dbo.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq=@requestId) delete from cabinet.dbo.ROI_RequestorPayment where ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq in (select seq from @tmp); delete from cabinet.dbo.ROI_ConversionMapping_RequestorPayment where ROI_RequestCore_Seq=@requestId;
delete from @tmp; insert into @tmp select ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq from cabinet.dbo.ROI_ConversionMapping_RequestorAdjustment where ROI_RequestCore_Seq=@requestId; delete from cabinet.dbo.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq=@requestId) delete from cabinet.dbo.ROI_RequestorAdjustment where ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq in (select seq from @tmp); delete from cabinet.dbo.ROI_ConversionMapping_RequestorAdjustment where ROI_RequestCore_Seq=@requestId;
Delete from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq from ROI_RequestCoreDelivery where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId Delete from ROI_RequestCoreChargesDocument where ROI_RequestCoreCharges_seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreCharges_seq from [ROI_RequestCoreCharges] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from ROI_RequestCoreChargesFee where ROI_RequestCoreCharges_seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreCharges_seq from [ROI_RequestCoreCharges] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from ROI_RequestCoreChargesShipping where ROI_RequestCoreCharges_seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreCharges_seq from [ROI_RequestCoreCharges] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from ROI_RequestCoreChargesSalesTaxReason where ROI_RequestCoreCharges_seq in (select ROI_RequestCoreCharges_seq from [ROI_RequestCoreCharges] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId) Delete from [ROI_RequestCoreCharges] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId Delete from ROI_RequestCoreDelivery where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId Delete from ROI_RequestCoreRequestor where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId Delete from ROI_RequestCoreEvent where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId Delete from ROI_EXT_SOURCE_DOCUMENTCore where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId Delete from ROI_Outbound_StatisticsCore where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId Delete from [ROI_RequestCore] where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = @requestId end try begin catch select ERROR_MESSAGE(), ERROR_LINE(); DECLARE @ErrMsg nvarchar(4000), @ErrSeverity int; SELECT @ErrSeverity = ERROR_SEVERITY(), @ErrMsg = ERROR_MESSAGE(); RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, @ErrSeverity, 1) end catch END

SELECT t1.ROI_RequestMain_Seq FROM cabinet.dbo.ROI_RequestMain t1 LEFT JOIN cabinet.dbo.ROI_ConversionStatus_RequestMain t2 on t1.ROI_RequestMain_Seq = t2.ROI_RequestMain_Seq and (t2.Status = 'Completed') where t2.ROI_RequestMain_Seq IS NULL AND t1.ROI_RequestMain_Seq = :requestId

SELECT t1.ROI_RequestMain_Seq FROM cabinet.dbo.ROI_RequestMain t1 LEFT JOIN cabinet.dbo.ROI_ConversionStatus_RequestMain t2 on t1.ROI_RequestMain_Seq = t2.ROI_RequestMain_Seq and (t2.Status = 'Completed') where t2.ROI_RequestMain_Seq IS NULL order by t1.Created_Dt desc

SELECT COUNT(t1.ROI_RequestMain_Seq) FROM cabinet.dbo.ROI_RequestMain t1 LEFT JOIN cabinet.dbo.ROI_ConversionStatus_RequestMain t2 on t1.ROI_RequestMain_Seq = t2.ROI_RequestMain_Seq and (t2.Status = 'Completed') where t2.ROI_RequestMain_Seq IS NULL

declare @requestId bigint; update cs set cs.Status='Expired' from ROI_ConversionStatus_RequestMain cs join ROI_RequestMain r on cs.ROI_RequestMain_Seq = r.ROI_RequestMain_Seq where r.Modified_Dt > cs.conversion_dt;
